title: Consumers Energy Offers 30,000 Thermostats to Continue Helping Michiganders with Winter Heating Costs
text: Help Still Available, While Natural Gas Costs Fall 24% in 4 Months JACKSON, Mich. , Feb. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy is providing 30,000 Google Nest smart thermostats to financially vulnerable natural gas customers to help Michiganders facing high household costs.

title: CMS Energy (CMS) Rewards Shareholders With 6% Dividend Hike
text: CMS Energy (CMS) increases the quarterly dividend to 48.75 cents per share, reflecting a rise of 6% from the previous payout.

title: CMS Energy Corporation (CMS) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: CMS Energy Corporation (NYSE:CMS ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 2, 2023 9:30 AM ET Company Participants Sri Maddipati - Treasurer and VP, Finance and IR Garrick Rochow - President and CEO Rejji Hayes - EVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Shahriar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Jeremy Tonet - JPMorgan Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Andrew Weisel - Scotia Bank David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Durgesh Chopra - Evercore Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho Travis Miller - Morningstar Operator Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the CMS Energy 2022 Year End Results Call. The earnings news release issued earlier today and the presentation used in this webcast are available on CMS Energy's website in the Investor Relations section.

title: CMS Energy (CMS) Q4 Earnings In Line, '23 EPS Guidance Up
text: CMS Energy's (CMS) Q4 operating revenues of $2,278 million exceed the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2,185.3 million by 4.2%. The top line improves 12.1% on a year-over-year basis.

title: CMS Energy's Board of Directors Increases Quarterly Dividend on Common Stock to 48.75 Cents Per Share
text: JACKSON, Mich. , Feb. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of CMS Energy today increased the quarterly dividend on the company's common stock to 48.75 cents per share, up from 46 cents per share.

title: CMS Energy Announces Strong 2022 Results for the 20th Consecutive Year and Raises 2023 Adjusted EPS Guidance
text: JACKSON, Mich. , Feb. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CMS Energy announced today reported earnings per share of $2.85 for 2022, compared to $4.66 per share for 2021.

title: Utilities to Report Q4 Earnings on Feb 2: CMS, WEC & BIP
text: Let's focus on utilities like CMS Energy Corporation (CMS), WEC Energy (WEC) and Brookfield Infrastructure (BIP), which are set to release fourth-quarter earnings on Feb 2.
